name: Besedo
description: Besedo — Content moderation platform combining AI classification with human review for marketplaces, dating, and UGC platforms.

seo.title: Besedo — Content Moderation API
seo.meta_description: Besedo: Besedo — Content moderation platform combining AI classification with human review for marketplaces, dating, and UGC platforms.

when_to_use: Moderating marketplace listings with AI + human reviewer hybrid
Scaling trust & safety for classified ads and dating platforms
Detecting fake listings and fraud signals in user-generated content
Building content compliance workflows with transparent decision logs

pros: Human moderators in the loop, not just AI
Deep experience with marketplaces and dating sites
Custom policies and QA workflows out of the box
Handles scaling spikes with managed ops team
cons: Managed service pricing, not pure API economics
Not ideal for billion-scale purely-automated pipelines
review.verdict: Solid choice when you need humans plus AI and don't want to build an in-house moderation team.
review.best_for: Marketplaces, dating, and classifieds needing managed moderation with human review.
review.not_for: High-volume, low-margin platforms that need pennies-per-call automated APIs.
